text: アイテムやスキルなどを登録できます。

The Sub-Palette allows you to register up to ten types of items and skills
to use in combat with the following controls:

-Move the cursor left and right with <%SubPaletteLeft> and <%SubPaletteRight>, and use your selection with <%SubPalette>.
-On a keyboard, use keys [1] through [0] to activate palette entries directly.

You can register items and skills by going to the
Main Menu > Equipment > Sub-Palette.
